Company Description:
Starting as a small poster print company in 2005, Wendover Art Group has grown into a multi-channel American manufacturer of high-quality artwork, mirrors, wallcoverings, lighting, textiles, bed swings, and sculptures for top interior designers and brands in both the residential and commercial markets. 

From its headquarters in Largo, FL (Tampa/St. Petersburg), Wendover maintains its commitment to producing artisanal creations that are domestically made, provide superior value to customers, invest in technology and talent, and strive to be The Source for Art. Building upon their luxury portfolio, in 2022, Wendover acquired Lowcountry Originals, a South Carolina manufacturer of lighting, bed swings, sculptures, and mirrors. In 2023, Wendover acquired Kevin O’Brien Studio, a textile company designed and handcrafted in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, and Friedman Brothers, a 120-year-old decorative mirror and furniture accessories company based in Miami, Florida. Stronger together, Wendover, Lowcountry Originals, Kevin O’Brien Studio, and Friedman Brothers are building and expanding their product capabilities and offerings. All products are available through a network of sales representatives, online, and in showrooms in High Point, Atlanta, Dallas, and Las Vegas. Learn more at wendoverart.com, lowcountryoriginals.com, kevinobrienstudio.com, friedmanbrothers.com, and follow @wendoverart, @lowcountry.originals and @kevinobrienstudio.
Company Specialties: art, art consulting services, art installation, art production, artist relations, bedding, canva, commercial, contracts, custom art, customer service, hospitality, lighting, manufacturing, mirrors, new technologies, photography, residential, retail, signs, textiles, wall art, wall decor, wallcovering

Company Description:
At Park West Gallery, we want to get you excited about art.

That's been our mission since we were founded in 1969. Park West Gallery believes that art is for everyone— over the past 50 years, we've introduced over 2 million clients to the joys of collecting art.

Today, Park West Gallery is the world's largest art dealer. You can find us at our expansive gallery and museum in Michigan or on over 90 luxury cruise ships all over the world. Park West carries artwork from a huge variety of artists, ranging from art world icons like Pablo Picasso, Salvador Dali, and Rembrandt van Rijn to such contemporary legends as Peter Max, Romero Britto, Thomas Kinkade, and more.

The Park West Foundation—our charitable non-profit organization—is devoted to making the world a better place. Founded in 2006, Park West Foundation offers support to children in the foster care system, advocates for environmental causes, and promotes arts education around the world.

Park West is a founding patron of the UK's Prince’s Trust International and aids organizations like Best Buddies and other charities that support underprivileged youth.

Park West Foundation also sponsors major museum exhibitions for such artists as Claude Monet, Autumn de Forest, Peter Max, Salvador Dali, and Tim Yanke, among others.

For information on careers with Park West Gallery, visit:
https://artauctionsabroad.com/
https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Park-West-Gallery-Reviews-E276316.htm
https://www.indeed.com/cmp/Park-West-Gallery/reviews

Be sure to follow Park West on social media:
https://www.facebook.com/ParkWestGallery/
https://www.instagram.com/parkwestgallery/
https://twitter.com/ParkWestGallery
https://www.youtube.com/user/ParkWestGallery
https://www.pinterest.com/parkwestgallery/

Learn more about the Park West Foundation here:
https://parkwestfoundation.org/
Company Specialties: art gallery, artists, auctions, fine art, retail

Company Description:
My Favorite Art Place has been creating/producing artwork to help businesses communicate their messages for over 3 decades. Our focus is custom size / custom color artwork to help create corporate culture and express your brand through the use of quality, thoughtful wall art. This translates into increased moral and higher productivity, thus a more profitable business.

We work directly with your team or with your Consultant to visually communicate your mission and enhance your environment.

Our artwork looks equally great in the bedroom as it does the boardroom. Everyone deserves a home where they can recharge and reenergize.

We look forward to working with you to solve your art decorating problems. We work with artists, photographers, interior decorators/designers and frame shops to produce pieces that can be resold.  We work with the general public in creating photo restorations and artwork made from occasions, vacations or any special memory - to decorate their home and work spaces.
Company Specialties: corporate interiors, custom framing, dye sublimation printing, fine art printing, giclee printing, memorials, photo restoration

Company Description:
Hasco Graphics was started in Cleveland a long, long time ago.  Founded by Howard Snelling, Hasco constructed its foundation as a commissioned manufacturer's representative firm for large manufacturers like 3M, Seal, National Graphics, KoroGraphics, Miller Weldmaster, and Neschen.  In the mid '90's, Hasco started to distribute inkjet printers as a "Value Added Reseller" gaining national recognition for being one of the top Raster Graphics and Encad dealers in the country.  As the industry changed, so did Hasco.  Now Hasco is one of the strongest Roland distributors, a key regional distributor for manufacturers such as CET, Screen USA, Sihl, and Seal to name a few.

In recent years, a new emphasis on supplies has pushed Hasco to becoming the strongest graphics distributor in the midwest.  Manufacturing adhesive vinyl, laminates, mounting adhesives, thermal films, wall coverings, and liquid coatings, Hasco has a wide range of products to suit just about any shop involved in any aspect of wide format printing.

We strive to live up to our three ideals: be innovative, reliable, and relative.  Our goal is to show you the latest and greatest products.  We want you to believe we'll deliver when promised.  Meetings with anyone on the Hasco team will be relative and pertinent.  We aren't out to waste your time. 

If you've done business with us in the past - thank you!  If we can earn an opportunity to do business with you in the future, by all means please let us know and we'll do our best to capitalize.

 

Hasco Graphics

(216) 662-7474

23070 Miles Rd.

Cleveland, OH  44128

Job Title: Co - Founder and Chief Executive Officer
Company Description:
Oliver Gal Artist Co. is a South Florida-based art and lifestyle brand founded by sisters Ana Gal Sánchez and Lola Sánchez. Inspired by the energy of the Miami art scene and shaped by global design influences, they’ve cultivated a bold and expressive aesthetic that transforms interiors into unforgettable experiences.

As a vertically integrated creative studio, Oliver Gal has evolved from its fine art origins into one of North America’s premier providers of high-impact wall décor. We serve clients across commercial, hospitality, retail, and trade channels with a full spectrum of art-forward solutions, including custom artwork, large-scale wallcoverings, statement mirrors, and distinctive wall accents.

What sets us apart is our end-to-end control of the creative and production process. From initial concept to final installation, every project is executed in-house with artistic rigor, design insight, and operational speed. Our multidisciplinary team of artists, designers, and project managers works closely with clients to develop tailored art collections that align with brand identity, enrich the customer or guest journey, and complement the architectural and interior design language of each space.

With a proprietary catalog of over 50,000+ original works and a robust custom capability, Oliver Gal delivers scalable art solutions that merge creativity with purposeful design, bringing meaningful visual storytelling to life at every touchpoint.
